scripts.build:wasm: cd .. && wasm-pack build crates/rwer-wasm --target web --out-dir ../../pkg --out-name rwer && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f='pkg/package.json',p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'));p.name='@ryaningli/rwer';p.keywords=['wer','cer','asr','nlp','speech-recognition','edit-distance','wasm','webassembly'];fs.writeFileSync(f,JSON.stringify(p,null,2)+'\n');fs.copyFileSync('README.md','pkg/README.md')"
